---
title: "Intensive Trainings"
subtitle: "Intensive 1-2 day technical workshops"
description: "Fast-track your technical skills with our intensive 1-2 day training workshops designed for busy professionals who need practical, hands-on learning in a condensed timeframe."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Intensive <span class="gr">Trainings</span></h1>
    <p>One- and two-day workshops that condense essential skills into focused, hands-on sessions you can apply immediately.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Seven workshops, zero fluff</h2>
    <p class="sub">80% hands-on. Walk out with skills you can use on Monday.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Open Source Contribution</h3><p>Git essentials, your first PR, and community best practices. 2 days.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/open-source-contribution/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Cybersecurity Essentials</h3><p>Threat landscape, security controls, and quick wins. 2 days.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/cybersecurity-essentials/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Linux Admin Fundamentals</h3><p>Command line, users, packages, and basic monitoring. 2 days.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/linux-admin-fundamentals/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-lock"></i><h3>Data Privacy Compliance</h3><p>GDPR, CCPA, data mapping, and breach response planning. 2 days.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/data-privacy-compliance/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Security Awareness for Teams</h3><p>Social engineering defense, safe habits, and incident reporting. 1 day.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/security-awareness-teams/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i><h3>Cyberhygiene Intensive</h3><p>Device security, authentication, and data protection essentials. 1 day.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/cyberhygiene-intensive/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-5 mt-2 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-snow"></i><h3>NixOS Security Jumpstart</h3><p>Declarative configuration, hardening, and reproducible environments. 2 days.</p><a href="/academy/trainings/nixos-security-jumpstart/" class="m-lk">Training details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Built for busy teams</h2>
    <p class="sub">Flexible delivery, lasting impact.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge"></i><h3>Immersive Learning</h3><p>80% hands-on activities with real-world scenarios and collaborative problem-solving.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i><h3>Flexible Delivery</h3><p>In-person at our facilities, on-site at your location, live virtual, or hybrid.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-headset"></i><h3>Ongoing Support</h3><p>30-day post-training support, reference materials, community forum, and follow-up Q&A.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">1–2</div><div class="m-nl">Days per workshop</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">80%</div><div class="m-nl">Hands-on time</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">30</div><div class="m-nl">Days post-training support</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Schedule a training<br>for your team</h2>
    <p>Custom workshops with organization-specific scenarios and flexible scheduling.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Expert trainers &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Practical focus &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Team pricing
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
